title: Quick Italian Zucchini Pasta
description: A light and refreshing Italian dish perfect for a quick weeknight fix, featuring zucchini and pineapple juice.
instructions: Bring a large pot of salted water to a boil and cook the linguine according to package instructions.
In a large skillet, heat the olive oil over medium heat and add the minced garlic.
Add the cherry tomatoes to the skillet and cook for 2-3 minutes, until they start to release their juices.
Add the grilled chicken breast to the skillet and cook for an additional 2-3 minutes, until heated through.
Add the zucchini to the skillet and cook for 2-3 minutes, until tender.
Stir in the pineapple juice, basil, salt, and black pepper.
Toss the cooked linguine in the skillet with the zucchini mixture.
Serve immediately, garnished with additional basil if desired.
